name: Sim: Booking & Refunds - Refund not received 45 days after cancellation
scenario_description: Passenger cancelled a fully refundable ticket 45 days ago. Portal shows Refund Processed but no credit has appeared on the original payment method.
complaint_description: I cancelled booking PNR-SIM-003 on January 24 2026 for flight ZA303, which was purchased as a fully refundable Business Select fare. The Lunar Air portal has shown Refund Processed since January 26 but as of today March 9 the $1,247 refund has not posted to my Visa card. I have called customer service three times and each agent says processing takes 7-10 business days. It has been 45 days. Please escalate to the finance team and provide written confirmation of the refund status.
